titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5981

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=754 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:57:31.624951+00 | translation moa=755 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:57:31.665127+00

div.p:
Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quorum noticiam littere iste peruenerint . Bertramus filius Robert
coco salutem . Nouerit vniuersitas uestra me dedisse . concesisse . et hac presenti carta
mea confirmasse deo et beato Cuthberto et sancte Ebbe et priori de Coldingham . et mona
chis ibidem deo seruientibus et inperpetuum seruituris . in liberam et perpetuam elemosinam
vnam dimidiam carucatam terre cum tofto et crofto in villa et territorio de Re
ningtona cum omnibus pertinetiis ad tantam terram in eadem villa pertinentibus infra
villa et extra sine vllo retinemento . Illo scilicet dimidiam carucatam terre quam
Waldeuus filius Cren quondam tenuit in villa de Reningtona . Tenend’ et habend’ .
dictis priori et conuentui et eorum successoribus inperpetuum . adeo libere . quiete . et honorifice .
sicut aliqua elemosina forinsecum faciens seruicium infra rengnum Scocie . liberius . uel
quietius tenetur . uel possidetur cum omnibus libertatibus et asiamentis suis . Et sciendum est
quod ego Bertramus et heredes mei quiti erimus de forinseco seruicio domini Regis et domus
de Coldingham quantum pertinet ad tantam terram in eadem uilla . Et preterea sciendum
est quod ego Bertramus et heredes mei predictam terram dictis priori et conuentui et eorum suc
cessoribus contra omnes homines et feminas inperpetuum warantizabimus . adquietabimus
et defendemus . Et vt hec mea donacio robur opptineat perpetuum huic scripto
sigillum meum apposui . Hiis testibus . dominus . dauid . de Graham . W . de Mothingtona
. W . de Scremerstona . R . nobili . R . de Mungumery . R . filio senescalli . dauid . de Lu
mesden’ . Ada filio Iohannis . Ada filio Walteri de Aytun . Patricio Scot . Iohanne filio eius .
Iohanne filio ynggram . Patricio filio Coleman . et ALIIS .

p.cl: To all Christ's faithful to whose notice these letters shall come, Bertram son of Robert Cook sends greeting.

Know me, all of you, to have given, granted, and by this my present charter to have confirmed to God, to blessed Cuthbert, St Ebbe, the prior of Coldingham, and the monks in that place serving God now an for ever, in free and everlasting alms, one half-ploughgate of land with toft and croft in the toun and territory of Renton, with all pertinents belonging to so much land, inside the same toun as well as outside, without any withholding; that is, the half-ploughgate of land which the late Waldef son of Cren held in the toun of Renton; for the said prior and convent and their successors to hold and to have for ever, as freely, quitely, and honourably as any alms doing forinsec service within the kingdom of Scotia are freely or honourably held or possessed, with all their liberties and easements. And it should be know that I, Bertram and my heirs, shall be quit of the forinsec service of the lord king and of the house of Coldingham, so far as it pertains to so much land in the same toun.

In addition, it should be known that I, Bertram, and my heirs shall warrant, acquit and defend the aforesaid land to the said prior and convent and their successors against all men and women for ever.
And that this my donation should have force for ever, I have applied my seal to this written document.

With these witnesses, the lord David of Graham, William of Mordington, William of Scremerston, Ralph Noble, Robert of Montgomery, Robert son of the Steward, David of Lumsdaine, Adam son of John, Adam son of Walter of Ayton, Patrick Scott, John his son, John son of Ingram, Patrick son of Colman, and others.
